headline: JPMorgan Cuts Procter & Gamble (PG) Target to $162 Ahead of Earnings Season
summary: The Procter & Gamble Company (NYSE:PG) is included among the 12 High Dividend Stocks Picked by Billionaire Ray Dalio. On April 17, JPMorgan analyst Andrea Teixeira lowered the firm’s price recommendation on The Procter & Gamble Company (NYSE:PG) to $162 from $165. It reiterated an Overweight rating on the shares. The firm updated its targets […]
